events.name: Add your FINNHUB_KEY to GitHub Secrets

detail.desc: Go to your GitHub repo → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret. Add FINNHUB_KEY (from finnhub.io, free) and FRED_KEY (from fred.stlouisfed.org, free). Then trigger the workflow manually from the Actions tab.
detail.history: See README.md for full setup instructions.
detail.watch: After adding your keys, click Actions → Fetch Macro Data Daily → Run workflow
detail.trade: Once keys are set, real economic events will appear here automatically.
